query: SELECT ac.competenciaId, ac.peso, c.nome as compNome, t.nome as trilhaNome, t.name as trilhaNameEn FROM assessment_competencias ac JOIN assessment_pdi ap ON ac.assessmentPdiId = ap.id LEFT JOIN competencias c ON ac.competenciaId = c.id LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id WHERE ap.alunoId = 30066;
